description_long: This guard rail consists of three horizontal rectangular bars, evenly spaced and connected by four vertical posts. The structure is made of a dark, likely metallic material, giving it a robust and industrial appearance. The horizontal rails are straight and parallel, with the middle rail slightly offset from the others, creating a modern, geometric pattern. The vertical posts are evenly distributed, providing structural support and stability. The ends of the rails are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or additional end treatments. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible reflective markings or color variations.
description: A dark, metallic guard rail with three horizontal bars and four vertical posts, featuring a modern, geometric design and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with all three horizontal bars and four vertical posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the guard rail, with only the edges of the horizontal bars and posts visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the same arrangement of horizontal bars and vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the alignment of the bars and posts.
